spec_match.rationale: Covers the getPredictedEvents() side of the spec change with a record/replay pattern.

interactive.rationale: Real draw canvas, replay canvas, predicted trail extrapolation.

edge_cases.rationale: No probe asserts the actual change vs pre-130.

design_system.rationale: Canvas drawing uses raw hex #000, #0022ff, #0a8f5c. These match --text-black/--accent-blue/--accent-emerald values but rule #5 forbids raw hex.

openQuestions.title: Source canvas stroke colors from CSS variables
openQuestions.detail: Use getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--text-black') etc. Raw hex literals violate rule #5.

openQuestions.title: Assert offsetX/Y preservation in a probe panel
openQuestions.detail: Add a side-by-side 'recorded offsetX vs replayed offsetX' table with pass/fail per coordinate.
